info.title: Reward Loyalty API
info.description:
The Reward Loyalty API provides programmatic access to the Reward Loyalty platform, enabling integration with external systems, mobile apps, and custom workflows. This RESTful API supports authentication, loyalty card management, member operations, partner operations, and transaction processing.

## Authentication

All authenticated endpoints use Bearer token authentication via Laravel Sanctum. Include your token in the Authorization header.

Tokens are obtained by calling the login endpoints for each user type (Admin, Partner, or Member).

## Rate Limiting

API requests are rate-limited to ensure fair usage. Standard limits apply per authenticated user.

## Response Format

All responses are returned in JSON format. Successful responses include the requested data, while errors include a message field describing the issue.

post.description: Authenticate using email and password to obtain a bearer token for subsequent API requests. This endpoint does not require authentication.
Revokes all access tokens for the authenticated administrator or manager.

get.summary: Retrieve authenticated administrator or manager data
get.description: Fetches data of the authenticated administrator or manager.
Retrieve a list of all partners the authenticated administrator has access to. Administrators (role=1) can view all partners; Managers see only partners within their assigned networks.

post.description: Create a new partner account with optional permissions and limits. A default club is automatically created for the partner.

network_id.description: Network ID to assign partner to

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific partner including their permissions and limits.

put.description: Update a partner's profile information. Does not include permissions - use the permissions endpoint for that.

delete.description: Permanently delete a partner and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.

get.description: Retrieve the feature permissions and usage limits for a partner. Used for SaaS billing management.

patch.description: Update the feature permissions and usage limits for a partner. Used for SaaS billing tier management. Use -1 for unlimited.

get.description: Retrieve current usage counts compared to limits for a partner. Useful for billing dashboards and limit enforcement.

post.description: Allows a new member to create an account by providing necessary details.

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: The password of the member, if empty a password is generated

parameters.name: time_zone
parameters.description: The time zone of the member

parameters.name: accepts_emails
parameters.description: Whether the member accepts marketing emails from a partner or not

parameters.name: send_mail
parameters.description: Whether to send an email with the password to the newly created member

post.description: Authenticate using email and password to obtain a bearer token for subsequent API requests. This endpoint does not require authentication.
Revokes all access tokens for the authenticated member, effectively logging them out.

get.description: Fetches the data of the authenticated member.

get.summary: Retrieve all cards followed and transacted by the member
get.description: Retrieve all cards that the authenticated member follows and has transacted with.

200.description: Successful operation, returns the array of followed and transacted cards

401.description: Unauthorized access, invalid or missing member token

get.summary: Retrieve all active cards followed by the member
get.description: Retrieve all active cards that the authenticated member follows.

200.description: Successful operation, returns the array of followed cards

401.description: Unauthorized access, invalid or missing member token

get.summary: Retrieve all active cards transacted by the member
get.description: Retrieve all active cards that the authenticated member has transacted with.

200.description: Successful operation, returns the array of cards with member's transactions

401.description: Unauthorized access, invalid or missing member token

get.summary: Retrieve member's balance for a specific card
get.description: Retrieve the balance of the authenticated member for a specific card.

200.description: Successful operation, returns the member's balance for the specific card

balance.description: The member's balance for the specific card

401.description: Unauthorized access, invalid or missing member token

get.description: Retrieve all stamp cards the member has added to their collection (enrolled).

post.summary: Add stamp card to My Cards
post.description: Enroll the member in a stamp card program (add to My Cards). This is equivalent to 'following' the stamp card.

delete.summary: Remove stamp card from My Cards
delete.description: Unenroll the member from a stamp card program. The enrollment record is marked inactive but not deleted, preserving progress.

message.example: Stamp card removed from My Cards

404.description: Stamp card not found or not enrolled

get.description: Retrieve all vouchers the member has saved to their collection (My Cards).

post.description: Save a voucher to the member's collection (add to My Cards). This is equivalent to 'following' the voucher.

delete.description: Remove a saved voucher from the member's collection. Only manually saved vouchers can be removed (not claimed via QR).

404.description: Voucher not found or not saved

get.description: Retrieve all stamp cards the authenticated member is enrolled in, including current progress, stamps collected, and rewards earned. Also returns aggregate statistics.
Retrieve the transaction history for a specific stamp card, including stamps earned, redeemed, and expired. History viewing must be enabled for the stamp card by the partner.

403.description: History viewing not enabled for this stamp card

post.description: Authenticate using email and password to obtain a bearer token for subsequent API requests. This endpoint does not require authentication.
Revoke all access tokens for the authenticated partner and log them out.

get.description: Retrieve the data of the authenticated partner.
Retrieve all active loyalty cards owned by the authenticated partner.

post.description: Create a new points-based loyalty card for the partner.

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific loyalty card by ID.

put.description: Update an existing loyalty card's details.

delete.description: Delete a loyalty card and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.

get.description: Retrieve all active clubs owned by the authenticated partner.

post.description: Create a new loyalty club for the partner.

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific club by ID.

delete.description: Delete a club and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.

put.description: Update the profile details of the currently authenticated partner. Only include fields you wish to modify.

requestBody.description: Provide the partner data you wish to update. Omit any key/value pairs that should remain unchanged.

get.description: Retrieve all members registered in the partner's clubs.

post.description: Register a new member in one of the partner's clubs.

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific member by ID.

delete.description: Delete a member. This action cannot be undone.

get.description: Retrieve all rewards owned by the authenticated partner.

post.description: Create a new reward for a loyalty card.

description.example: Enjoy a free coffee of your choice

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific reward by ID.

delete.description: Delete a reward. This action cannot be undone.

get.description: Retrieve all active staff members for the authenticated partner.

post.description: Create a new staff member for the partner.

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific staff member by ID.

put.description: Update an existing staff member's details.

delete.description: Delete a staff member. This action cannot be undone.

get.description: Retrieve all stamp cards owned by the authenticated partner.

post.description: Create a new stamp-based loyalty card for the partner.

reward_description.example: Get a free coffee of your choice

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific stamp card by ID.

put.description: Update an existing stamp card's details.

delete.description: Delete a stamp card. This action cannot be undone.

post.summary: Add a purchase to a card
post.description: Add a new purchase transaction to a card where the authenticated partner has access to.

parameters.name: cardUID
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the card to which the transaction will be added

purchase_amount.description: The amount of money spent on the purchase

image.description: The image associated with the transaction

note.description: An optional note for the purchase

post.description: Add new points to a card where the authenticated partner has access to.

parameters.name: cardUID
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the card to which the transaction will be added

points.description: The number of points to add

image.description: The image associated with the transaction

note.description: An optional note for the points addition

get.description: Retrieve all vouchers owned by the authenticated partner.

post.description: Create a new voucher for the partner.

discount_amount.description: Discount amount in cents (for fixed) or percentage

max_uses_per_member.description: Max uses per member (-1 for unlimited)

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific voucher by ID.

delete.description: Delete a voucher. This action cannot be undone.

post.description: Authenticate a staff member and receive an API token for subsequent requests.
Invalidate the current API token and log out.

get.description: Retrieve the authenticated staff member's profile including their assigned club.
Look up a member by ID, unique identifier, email, or phone. Returns member details and balances.

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: Member ID, unique identifier, email, or phone

post.description: Record a purchase transaction and award points to a member based on the card's earning rules. This is the primary transaction for points-based loyalty programs.

403.description: Staff not authorized for this card

post.description: Redeem a reward for a member, deducting the required points from their balance.

404.description: Card, reward, or member not found

post.description: Add one or more stamps to a member's stamp card. Automatically handles card completion and pending rewards.

404.description: Stamp card or member not found

post.description: Redeem a pending reward from a completed stamp card.

404.description: Stamp card or member not found

post.description: Check if a voucher code is valid, not expired, and can be used by the member. Returns discount details if valid.

order_amount.description: Order amount in cents (for min purchase check)

post.description: Apply a voucher to a transaction. Records the redemption and returns the discount applied.

ErrorResponse.description: Standard error response for failed operations

UnauthenticatedResponse.description: Response when authentication is required but not provided or invalid

NotFoundResponse.description: Response when the requested resource does not exist

ForbiddenResponse.description: Response when the user lacks permission to access the resource

message.example: You do not have permission to access this resource.

token.description: Bearer token for authenticating subsequent requests
Bearer token for authenticating subsequent requests
Bearer token for authenticating subsequent requests

AdminPartner.description: Partner data as viewed by an administrator

is_active.description: Whether the partner account is active

StaffMember.description: Staff member who can process transactions

Club.description: A loyalty club containing cards and members

balance.description: Member's current point balance (-1 if not applicable)

StampCardsResponse.description: Response containing member's stamp cards and statistics

StampHistoryResponse.description: Response containing stamp card transaction history

PurchaseRequest.description: Request body for adding a purchase transaction

BalanceResponse.description: Response containing a member's point balance

AdminPartnerFull.description: Partner data with permissions as viewed by an administrator

PartnerPermissions.description: Partner feature permissions and limits for SaaS billing management

PartnerUsage.description: Partner usage statistics compared to limits

Voucher.description: A promotional voucher or discount code

Reward.description: A loyalty reward that can be redeemed

admin_auth_token.description: Administrator authentication token obtained from the login endpoint. Include in the Authorization header as `Bearer <token>`.

partner_auth_token.description: Partner authentication token obtained from the login endpoint. Include in the Authorization header as `Bearer <token>`.

member_auth_token.description: Member authentication token obtained from the login endpoint. Include in the Authorization header as `Bearer <token>`.

tags.name: Admin
tags.description: Endpoints for platform administrators and managers. Admins can manage partners, view system-wide data, and configure platform settings.

tags.name: Partner
tags.description: Endpoints for business partners (merchants). Partners can manage their clubs, loyalty cards, staff members, and process customer transactions.

tags.name: Member
tags.description: Endpoints for loyalty program members (customers). Members can view their cards, check balances, and track their stamp card progress.

tags.name: Staff
tags.description: Endpoints for staff members operating point-of-sale systems. Staff can look up members, add purchases, award points, add stamps, and redeem rewards and vouchers.
